ocr_findings.description: Multi-line cell content (e.g. 'デジュールスタンダード\n(de jure standard)') is split across lines within cells in the OCR markdown table — the content is fully present, just with line breaks inside cells rather than inline. Meaning preserved.
'試験にはつしが出る！' heading in OCR; image shows '試験にはコレが出る！' — same コレ→つし logo recognition error as seen on other pages. Cosmetic.

reviewer_notes: 標準の分類 content page. Three-row classification table (デジュールスタンダード/フォーラム標準/デファクトスタンダード) with full descriptions faithfully reproduced. Summary bullet list at bottom correctly captured. The コレが出る！ logo character error is a known recurring pattern across pages and is cosmetic only.
